name: aunion-ai
description: Aunion AI - Korean Lecture Real-time Translation
author: Aunion Team

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n backend,frontend,turn -c blue,green,yellow "conda run --no-capture-output -n aunion python backend/run.py" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:48000/health && npm run dev --prefix frontend" "node turn-server/index.js"
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n backend,frontend,turn,electron -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "conda run --no-capture-output -n aunion python backend/run.py" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:48000/health && npm run dev --prefix frontend" "node turn-server/index.js" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:43000 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron ."
scripts.electron:build: npm run build --prefix frontend && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json
scripts.build:backend: conda run --no-capture-output -n aunion pyinstaller backend/aunion.spec -y --distpath backend/dist --workpath backend/build
scripts.build:installer: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build:backend && npm run electron:build && node scripts/run-iscc.js installer.iss
